practice.task: Filter the array to keep only numbers greater than 10, then map them to their squares. Print the result.
practice.title: Filter and Square

meta:
TITLE: Filter and Square
TASK: Filter the array to keep only numbers greater than 10, then map to squares.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: [225, 400, 144]
HINT: Use .filter() and .map() array methods.
